Ping, ARP ve raw-socket/TCP probelarını: Capture device, MAC, and manufacturer information by combining ping, ARP, and raw-socket/TCP probes.
Hybrid mod önce ARP broadcast, sonra ICM: Hybrid mode first tries ARP broadcast, then ICMP ping and service port probe. If there is a MAC, the vendor is automatically detected.
Ağ cihazlarını keşfetmek için Scapy ARP,: Scapy ARP, OS ping and TCP socket probe engines are used together to explore network devices.
Ağdaki tüm cihazlara donanım seviyesinde: Breaks through firewalls that refuse to communicate by querying all devices on the network at the hardware level.
Sadece IP adresini bulmakla kalmaz; ciha: It not only finds the IP address; it also analyzes the physical hardware identity of the device and its name on the local network.
MAC adresi OUI verisi ile eşleştirilerek: By matching the MAC address with the OUI data, the manufacturer information such as Apple, Samsung, Cisco is displayed.
